sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useContext } from 'react'; import { AppContext } from '../App'; import { Colaborador } from '../types'; const Colaboradores: React.FC = () => { const { colaboradores, setColaboradores } = useContext(AppContext); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [filter, setFilter] = useState<'All' | 'Ativo' | 'Afastado'>('All'); const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false); const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState(null); const [formData, setFormData] = useState>({ nome: '', numeroColaborador: '', nif: '', inss: '', cargo: '', tipoContrato: 'Efectivo', salarioBase: 0, status: 'Ativo', email: '', dataAdmissao: '' }); const filteredColaboradores = colaboradores.filter(c => { const matchesSearch = c.nome.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || c.nif.includes(searchTerm) || c.cargo.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()); const matchesFilter = filter === 'All' ? true : c.status === filter; return matchesSearch && matchesFilter; }); const handleOpenModal = (colab?: Colaborador) => { if (colab) { setEditingId(colab.id); setFormData(colab); } else { setEditingId(null); setFormData({ nome: '', numeroColaborador: '', nif: '', inss: '', cargo: '', tipoContrato: 'Efectivo', salarioBase: 0, status: 'Ativo', email: '', dataAdmissao: '' }); } setIsModalOpen(true); }; const handleSave = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); if (editingId) { setColaboradores(colaboradores.map(c => c.id === editingId ? { ...c, ...formData } as Colaborador : c)); } else { const newColab = { ...formData, id: Date.now() } as Colaborador; setColaboradores([...colaboradores, newColab]); } setIsModalOpen(false); }; const handleDelete = (id: number) => { if (window.confirm("Pretende mesmo eliminar este colaborador?")) { setColaboradores(colaboradores.filter(c => c.id !== id)); } }; return (

ID: {c.numeroColaborador || '-'}
{c.nif}
 {c.cargo} {Number(c.salarioBase).toLocaleString()} Kz {c.status}

{/* Modal Adicionar/Editar */} {isModalOpen && (

{editingId ? 'edit' : 'person_add'} {editingId ? 'Editar Colaborador' : 'Adicionar Colaborador'}

setFormData({...formData, nome: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:border-primary" />
setFormData({...formData, email: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:border-primary" />
setFormData({...formData, numeroColaborador: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:border-primary" />
setFormData({...formData, nif: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:border-primary" />
setFormData({...formData, inss: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:border-primary" />
setFormData({...formData, cargo: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:border-primary" />
setFormData({...formData, salarioBase: Number(e.target.value)})} className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:border-primary" />
setFormData({...formData, dataAdmissao: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:border-primary" />
)}
); }; export default Colaboradores;
